data.title: Agentic automation in Europe is growing with increased sophistication; service development accelerating, says ISG.
data.description: The growth of intelligent automation in Europe is progressing, showcasing increased sophistication and rapid advancements in service and solution creation, according to ISG. The region is witnessing a noteworthy evolution in this field, with significant developments being made in artificial intelligence.

data.title: Amentum wins $730M contracts from EDF to provide services for UK nuclear reactors and Hinkley Point.
data.description: In Chantilly, Virginia, Amentum (NYSE: AMTM) announced winning new contracts from Électricité de France (EDF) valued at up to $730 million (£540 million). The contracts will enhance the critical solutions offered for the UK’s current nuclear reactors and support the development of a new gigawatt power station at Hinkley Point. Loren Jones, the senior vice president leading Amentum’s Energy & Environment-International business, highlighted the company’s proficiency in providing operational support for gigawatt reactors.

data.title: South Korea facing stablecoin debate with concerns over capital flows, issuer oversight, and USD risks.
data.description: The discussion on stablecoins in South Korea has hit a standstill as the central bank expresses worries about issues relating to capital flows, supervision of issuers, and risks associated with being linked to the US dollar.

data.title: Alrajhi Medicine in Saudi to digitize operations with Oracle, using EHR and Cloud Apps for efficiency and growth.
data.description: Alrajhi Medicine, a rapidly expanding private healthcare network in Saudi Arabia, has recently implemented Oracle Health Foundation EHR and Oracle Fusion Cloud Applications on January 27, 2026, in Austin, Texas. This strategic move aims to enhance efficiency within their operations and propel further growth. Alrajhi Medicine currently operates several multi-specialty hospitals and medical centers as part of their network.

data.title: EPG secures almost US$100M in Series B funding led by Forebright and Silicon Peak, with participation from other major firms.
data.description: In Singapore on January 27, 2026, EPG successfully concluded its Series B funding round, securing close to US$100 million. The investment was jointly led by Forebright and Silicon Peak, global investment companies, along with contributions from GL Ventures, NRL Capital, YF Capital, and Rockets Capital.

data.title: BIOSeedin Winter Innovation Partnering Summit held on Jan 11, 2026 in San Francisco spotlighting Chinese innovative drugs.
data.description: On January 11, 2026, the BIOSeedin Winter Innovation Partnering Summit was held in San Francisco as a highlight of J.P. Morgan Healthcare Week. The event focused on the China Asset Showcase and aimed to establish a specialized platform for Chinese innovative drugs. The summit attracted participation from numerous stakeholders in the healthcare sector. This initiative served as a key opportunity for networking and collaboration in the industry, facilitating discussions on advancements in pharmaceutical innovation.

data.title: SellYourWay.org releases new White Paper on Seller Financing in Small Business Sales on Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: Today, in Independence, Ohio, SellYourWay.org, a website focusing on educating small business owners, has unveiled a comprehensive white paper named "The Role of Seller Financing in Closing Deals." This informative document, released on Jan. 27, 2026, aims to provide valuable insights. Lauren Drummond Dale from MCBI has contributed to this white paper.

data.title: 84% of high-risk European orgs lack ability to handle insider incidents amid geopolitical tensions, per new report.
data.description: According to the Insider Risk Trend Report 2026 released by Signpost Six, an insider risk advisory firm, a staggering 84% of high-risk profile organizations in Europe feel unprepared to identify and manage insider incidents. The report, unveiled today in THE HAGUE, Netherlands, highlights the concerning statistic, shedding light on the lack of readiness within European companies.

data.title: ETH price may reach $3,200 by Feb 2026, supported by $2,880. RSI at 41.28 hints at bullish momentum.
data.description: Ethereum (ETH) may potentially reach $3,200 in the upcoming weeks, with key support resting at $2,880 as per technical analysis. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral 41.28, hinting at possible upward momentum.
